




bca_planet_setting_zone_select_toggle_z1_icon = {
    potential = {
        always = yes
    }
    allow = {
        always = yes
    }
    effect = {
        if = {
            limit = {
                has_planet_flag = bca_pf_ps_ext_zone_z1
            }
            remove_planet_flag = bca_pf_ps_ext_zone_z1
            bca_clean_flags_zone_selector = yes

        }
        else = {
            clear_open_selector = yes

            set_planet_flag = bca_pf_ps_ext_zone_z1

                bca_primary_district_update_zone_options = {
        ZONE_SLOT = z1
    }

        }
    }
}

    bca_planet_setting_z1_s10 = {
    potential = {
        has_planet_flag = bca_pf_ps_ext_zone_z1

            which = zone_selector_options_count

        always = yes

    bca_planet_setting_z1_s12 = {
    potential = {
        has_planet_flag = bca_pf_ps_ext_zone_z1
        check_variable = {
            which = zone_selector_options_count
            value >= 12
        }
    }

        always = yes
    }

    bca_planet_setting_z1_s14 = {
    potential = {
        has_planet_flag = bca_pf_ps_ext_zone_z1
        check_variable = {
            which = zone_selector_options_count
            value >= 14

    }

        always = yes
    }

bca_planet_setting_zone_select_toggle_z2_icon = {
    potential = {
        always = yes
    }
    allow = {
        always = yes
    }
    effect = {
        if = {
            limit = {
                has_planet_flag = bca_pf_ps_ext_zone_z2
            }
            remove_planet_flag = bca_pf_ps_ext_zone_z2
            bca_clean_flags_zone_selector = yes

        }
        else = {
            clear_open_selector = yes

            set_planet_flag = bca_pf_ps_ext_zone_z2

                bca_primary_district_update_zone_options = {
        ZONE_SLOT = z2
    }

        }
    }
}
bca_planet_setting_z2_icon = {
    potential = {
    }
    allow = {
        always = yes
    }
    effect = {
    }
}
    bca_planet_setting_z2_s1 = {
    potential = {
        has_planet_flag = bca_pf_ps_ext_zone_z2
        check_variable = {
            which = zone_selector_options_count
            value >= 1
        }
    }
    allow = {
        always = yes
    }
    effect = {
        bca_planet_setting_remove_current_selected_zone = {
        ZONE_SLOT = z2
    }

            if = {
        limit = {
            has_planet_flag = bca_pf_ps_zone_option_elected_s1_urban

}
    bca_planet_setting_z2_s3 = {
    potential = {
        has_planet_flag = bca_pf_ps_ext_zone_z2
        check_variable = {
            which = zone_selector_options_count
            value >= 3
        }
    }
    allow = {
        always = yes
    }
    effect = {
        bca_planet_setting_remove_current_selected_zone = {
        ZONE_SLOT = z2
    }

            if = {
        limit = {
            has_planet_flag = bca_pf_ps_zone_option_elected_s3_urban
        }
        set_planet_flag = bca_pf_ps_selected_zone_type_z2_urban
        if = {
            limit = {
                has_planet_flag = bca_pf_ps_option_map_urban_zone_urban

    }

        remove_planet_flag = bca_pf_ps_ext_zone_z2

        bca_clean_flags_zone_selector = yes

    }

        has_planet_flag = bca_pf_ps_ext_zone_z2

        always = yes

    bca_planet_setting_z2_s14 = {

        has_planet_flag = bca_pf_ps_ext_zone_z2

bca_planet_setting_zone_select_toggle_z3_icon = {
    potential = {
        has_planet_flag = bca_pf_ps_show_detailed_secondary_districts
    }
    allow = {
        always = yes
    }
    effect = {
        if = {
            limit = {
                has_planet_flag = bca_pf_ps_ext_zone_z3
            }
            remove_planet_flag = bca_pf_ps_ext_zone_z3
            bca_clean_flags_zone_selector = yes
    bca_clean_flags_zone_selector_secondary_district = yes

        }
        else = {
            clear_open_selector = yes

            set_planet_flag = bca_pf_ps_ext_zone_z3

                bca_secondary_district_update_zone_options = {
        ZONE_SLOT = z3
    }

        }
    }
}

    potential = {
        has_planet_flag = bca_pf_ps_show_detailed_secondary_districts

        always = yes
    }
    effect = {
    }

        has_planet_flag = bca_pf_ps_ext_zone_z3

}
    bca_planet_setting_z3_s3 = {
    potential = {
        has_planet_flag = bca_pf_ps_ext_zone_z3
        check_variable = {
            which = zone_selector_options_count
            value >= 3
        }
    }
    allow = {
        always = yes
    }
    effect = {
        bca_planet_setting_remove_current_selected_zone = {
        ZONE_SLOT = z3
    }

            if = {
        limit = {
            has_planet_flag = bca_pf_ps_zone_option_elected_s3_urban

}
    bca_planet_setting_z3_s5 = {
    potential = {
        has_planet_flag = bca_pf_ps_ext_zone_z3
        check_variable = {
            which = zone_selector_options_count
            value >= 5
        }
    }
    allow = {
        always = yes
    }
    effect = {
        bca_planet_setting_remove_current_selected_zone = {
        ZONE_SLOT = z3
    }

            if = {
        limit = {
            has_planet_flag = bca_pf_ps_zone_option_elected_s5_urban
        }
        set_planet_flag = bca_pf_ps_selected_zone_type_z3_urban
        if = {
            limit = {
                has_planet_flag = bca_pf_ps_option_map_urban_zone_urban
            }
            set_planet_flag = bca_pf_ps_selected_zone_z3_zone_urban

        if = {
            limit = {
                has_planet_flag = bca_pf_ps_option_map_urban_zone_subterranean_urban
            }
            set_planet_flag = bca_pf_ps_selected_zone_z3_zone_subterranean_urban
        }
        if = {
            limit = {
                has_planet_flag = bca_pf_ps_option_map_urban_zone_agrarian_anglers
            }
            set_planet_flag = bca_pf_ps_selected_zone_z3_zone_agrarian_anglers
        }
    }
    if = {
        limit = {
            has_planet_flag = bca_pf_ps_zone_option_elected_s5_trade

        set_planet_flag = bca_pf_ps_selected_zone_type_z3_trade

            limit = {

}
    bca_planet_setting_z3_s7 = {
    potential = {
        has_planet_flag = bca_pf_ps_ext_zone_z3
        check_variable = {
            which = zone_selector_options_count
            value >= 7
        }
    }
    allow = {
        always = yes
    }
    effect = {
        bca_planet_setting_remove_current_selected_zone = {
        ZONE_SLOT = z3
    }

            if = {
        limit = {
            has_planet_flag = bca_pf_ps_zone_option_elected_s7_urban
        }
        set_planet_flag = bca_pf_ps_selected_zone_type_z3_urban
        if = {
            limit = {

bca_planet_setting_zone_select_toggle_z4_icon = {
    potential = {
        has_planet_flag = bca_pf_ps_show_detailed_secondary_districts
    }
    allow = {
        always = yes
    }
    effect = {
        if = {
            limit = {
                has_planet_flag = bca_pf_ps_ext_zone_z4
            }
            remove_planet_flag = bca_pf_ps_ext_zone_z4
            bca_clean_flags_zone_selector = yes
    bca_clean_flags_zone_selector_secondary_district = yes

        }
        else = {
            clear_open_selector = yes

            set_planet_flag = bca_pf_ps_ext_zone_z4

                bca_secondary_district_update_zone_options = {
        ZONE_SLOT = z4
    }

        }
    }
}

        has_planet_flag = bca_pf_ps_show_detailed_secondary_districts

        always = yes
    }
    effect = {
    }

    bca_planet_setting_z4_s3 = {
    potential = {
        has_planet_flag = bca_pf_ps_ext_zone_z4
        check_variable = {
            which = zone_selector_options_count
            value >= 3
        }
    }
    allow = {
        always = yes
    }
    effect = {
        bca_planet_setting_remove_current_selected_zone = {
        ZONE_SLOT = z4
    }

}
    bca_planet_setting_z4_s5 = {
    potential = {
        has_planet_flag = bca_pf_ps_ext_zone_z4
        check_variable = {
            which = zone_selector_options_count
            value >= 5
        }
    }
    allow = {
        always = yes
    }
    effect = {
        bca_planet_setting_remove_current_selected_zone = {
        ZONE_SLOT = z4
    }

            if = {
        limit = {
            has_planet_flag = bca_pf_ps_zone_option_elected_s5_urban

    bca_planet_setting_z4_s7 = {
    potential = {
        has_planet_flag = bca_pf_ps_ext_zone_z4
        check_variable = {
            which = zone_selector_options_count
            value >= 7
        }
    }
    allow = {
        always = yes
    }
    effect = {
        bca_planet_setting_remove_current_selected_zone = {
        ZONE_SLOT = z4
    }

        limit = {
            has_planet_flag = bca_pf_ps_zone_option_elected_s7_urban

}
    bca_planet_setting_z4_s9 = {
    potential = {
        has_planet_flag = bca_pf_ps_ext_zone_z4
        check_variable = {
            which = zone_selector_options_count
            value >= 9
        }
    }
    allow = {
        always = yes
    }
    effect = {
        bca_planet_setting_remove_current_selected_zone = {
        ZONE_SLOT = z4
    }

            if = {
        limit = {
            has_planet_flag = bca_pf_ps_zone_option_elected_s9_urban
        }
        set_planet_flag = bca_pf_ps_selected_zone_type_z4_urban
        if = {
            limit = {
                has_planet_flag = bca_pf_ps_option_map_urban_zone_urban
            }
            set_planet_flag = bca_pf_ps_selected_zone_z4_zone_urban
        }
        if = {
            limit = {
                has_planet_flag = bca_pf_ps_option_map_urban_zone_subterranean_urban
            }
            set_planet_flag = bca_pf_ps_selected_zone_z4_zone_subterranean_urban
        }
        if = {
            limit = {
                has_planet_flag = bca_pf_ps_option_map_urban_zone_agrarian_anglers
            }
            set_planet_flag = bca_pf_ps_selected_zone_z4_zone_agrarian_anglers
        }
    }
    if = {
        limit = {
            has_planet_flag = bca_pf_ps_zone_option_elected_s9_trade
        }
        set_planet_flag = bca_pf_ps_selected_zone_type_z4_trade

}
    bca_planet_setting_z4_s11 = {
    potential = {
        has_planet_flag = bca_pf_ps_ext_zone_z4
        check_variable = {
            which = zone_selector_options_count
            value >= 11
        }
    }
    allow = {

bca_planet_setting_zone_select_toggle_z5_icon = {
    potential = {
        has_planet_flag = bca_pf_ps_show_detailed_secondary_districts
    }
    allow = {
        always = yes
    }
    effect = {
        if = {
            limit = {
                has_planet_flag = bca_pf_ps_ext_zone_z5
            }
            remove_planet_flag = bca_pf_ps_ext_zone_z5
            bca_clean_flags_zone_selector = yes
    bca_clean_flags_zone_selector_secondary_district = yes

        }
        else = {
            clear_open_selector = yes

            set_planet_flag = bca_pf_ps_ext_zone_z5

                bca_secondary_district_update_zone_options = {
        ZONE_SLOT = z5
    }

        }
    }
}

    bca_planet_setting_z5_s3 = {

        has_planet_flag = bca_pf_ps_ext_zone_z5
        check_variable = {
            which = zone_selector_options_count
            value >= 3
        }
    }
    allow = {
        always = yes
    }

        bca_planet_setting_remove_current_selected_zone = {

    bca_planet_setting_z5_s5 = {
    potential = {
        has_planet_flag = bca_pf_ps_ext_zone_z5
        check_variable = {
            which = zone_selector_options_count
            value >= 5
        }
    }
    allow = {
        always = yes
    }
    effect = {
        bca_planet_setting_remove_current_selected_zone = {
        ZONE_SLOT = z5
    }

    bca_planet_setting_z5_s7 = {
    potential = {
        has_planet_flag = bca_pf_ps_ext_zone_z5
        check_variable = {
            which = zone_selector_options_count
            value >= 7
        }
    }
    allow = {
        always = yes
    }
    effect = {
        bca_planet_setting_remove_current_selected_zone = {
        ZONE_SLOT = z5
    }

    bca_planet_setting_z5_s9 = {
    potential = {
        has_planet_flag = bca_pf_ps_ext_zone_z5
        check_variable = {
            which = zone_selector_options_count
            value >= 9
        }
    }
    allow = {
        always = yes
    }
    effect = {
        bca_planet_setting_remove_current_selected_zone = {
        ZONE_SLOT = z5
    }

}
    bca_planet_setting_z5_s11 = {
    potential = {
        has_planet_flag = bca_pf_ps_ext_zone_z5
        check_variable = {
            which = zone_selector_options_count
            value >= 11
        }
    }
    allow = {
        always = yes
    }
    effect = {
        bca_planet_setting_remove_current_selected_zone = {
        ZONE_SLOT = z5
    }

            if = {
        limit = {
            has_planet_flag = bca_pf_ps_zone_option_elected_s11_urban
        }
        set_planet_flag = bca_pf_ps_selected_zone_type_z5_urban

                has_planet_flag = bca_pf_ps_option_map_urban_zone_urban

            }
            set_planet_flag = bca_pf_ps_selected_zone_z5_zone_subterranean_urban

        if = {

        }
    }
    if = {
        limit = {
            has_planet_flag = bca_pf_ps_zone_option_elected_s11_trade

}
    bca_planet_setting_z5_s13 = {
    potential = {
        has_planet_flag = bca_pf_ps_ext_zone_z5
        check_variable = {
            which = zone_selector_options_count
            value >= 13
        }
    }
    allow = {
        always = yes
    }
    effect = {
        bca_planet_setting_remove_current_selected_zone = {
        ZONE_SLOT = z5
    }

            if = {
        limit = {
            has_planet_flag = bca_pf_ps_zone_option_elected_s13_urban
        }
        set_planet_flag = bca_pf_ps_selected_zone_type_z5_urban
        if = {
            limit = {
                has_planet_flag = bca_pf_ps_option_map_urban_zone_urban
            }
            set_planet_flag = bca_pf_ps_selected_zone_z5_zone_urban
        }

bca_planet_setting_zone_select_toggle_zx_icon = {
    potential = {
        bca_has_secondary_districts = yes
        NOT = { has_planet_flag = bca_pf_ps_show_detailed_secondary_districts }
    }
    allow = {
        always = yes
    }
    effect = {
        if = {
            limit = {
                has_planet_flag = bca_pf_ps_ext_zone_zx
            }
            remove_planet_flag = bca_pf_ps_ext_zone_zx
            bca_clean_flags_zone_selector = yes
    bca_clean_flags_zone_selector_secondary_district = yes

        }
        else = {
            clear_open_selector = yes

            set_planet_flag = bca_pf_ps_ext_zone_zx

                bca_secondary_district_update_zone_options = {
        ZONE_SLOT = zx
    }

        }
    }
}

    }

    bca_planet_setting_zx_s2 = {
    potential = {
        has_planet_flag = bca_pf_ps_ext_zone_zx
        check_variable = {
            which = zone_selector_options_count
            value >= 2
        }
    }
    allow = {
        always = yes
    }

        bca_planet_setting_remove_current_selected_zone = {

    bca_planet_setting_zx_s6 = {
    potential = {
        has_planet_flag = bca_pf_ps_ext_zone_zx
        check_variable = {
            which = zone_selector_options_count
            value >= 6
        }
    }
    allow = {
        always = yes
    }
    effect = {
        bca_planet_setting_remove_current_selected_zone = {

}
    bca_planet_setting_zx_s11 = {
    potential = {
        has_planet_flag = bca_pf_ps_ext_zone_zx
        check_variable = {
            which = zone_selector_options_count
            value >= 11
        }
    }
    allow = {
        always = yes
    }
    effect = {
        bca_planet_setting_remove_current_selected_zone = {
        ZONE_SLOT = zx
    }
            bca_planet_setting_remove_current_selected_zone = {
                ZONE_SLOT = z3
            }
            bca_planet_setting_remove_current_selected_zone = {
                ZONE_SLOT = z4
            }
            bca_planet_setting_remove_current_selected_zone = {
                ZONE_SLOT = z5
            }

    bca_planet_setting_zx_s15 = {
    potential = {
        has_planet_flag = bca_pf_ps_ext_zone_zx
        check_variable = {
            which = zone_selector_options_count
            value >= 15
        }
    }
    allow = {
        always = yes
    }
    effect = {
        bca_planet_setting_remove_current_selected_zone = {
        ZONE_SLOT = zx
    }
            bca_planet_setting_remove_current_selected_zone = {
                ZONE_SLOT = z3
            }
            bca_planet_setting_remove_current_selected_zone = {
                ZONE_SLOT = z4
            }
            bca_planet_setting_remove_current_selected_zone = {
                ZONE_SLOT = z5
            }

            if = {
        limit = {
            has_planet_flag = bca_pf_ps_zone_option_elected_s15_urban
        }
        set_planet_flag = bca_pf_ps_selected_zone_type_zx_urban
                set_planet_flag = bca_pf_ps_selected_zone_type_z3_urban
                set_planet_flag = bca_pf_ps_selected_zone_type_z4_urban
                set_planet_flag = bca_pf_ps_selected_zone_type_z5_urban
        if = {
            limit = {
                has_planet_flag = bca_pf_ps_option_map_urban_zone_urban
            }
            set_planet_flag = bca_pf_ps_selected_zone_zx_zone_urban
                    set_planet_flag = bca_pf_ps_selected_zone_z3_zone_urban
                    set_planet_flag = bca_pf_ps_selected_zone_z4_zone_urban
                    set_planet_flag = bca_pf_ps_selected_zone_z5_zone_urban
        }
        if = {
            limit = {
                has_planet_flag = bca_pf_ps_option_map_urban_zone_subterranean_urban
            }
            set_planet_flag = bca_pf_ps_selected_zone_zx_zone_subterranean_urban
                    set_planet_flag = bca_pf_ps_selected_zone_z3_zone_subterranean_urban
                    set_planet_flag = bca_pf_ps_selected_zone_z4_zone_subterranean_urban
                    set_planet_flag = bca_pf_ps_selected_zone_z5_zone_subterranean_urban

            has_planet_flag = bca_pf_ps_zone_option_elected_s15_wilderness_minerals
        }
        set_planet_flag = bca_pf_ps_selected_zone_type_zx_wilderness_minerals
                set_planet_flag = bca_pf_ps_selected_zone_type_z3_wilderness_minerals
                set_planet_flag = bca_pf_ps_selected_zone_type_z4_wilderness_minerals
                set_planet_flag = bca_pf_ps_selected_zone_type_z5_wilderness_minerals
        if = {
            limit = {
                has_planet_flag = bca_pf_ps_option_map_wilderness_minerals_zone_minerals_wilderness
            }
            set_planet_flag = bca_pf_ps_selected_zone_zx_zone_minerals_wilderness
                    set_planet_flag = bca_pf_ps_selected_zone_z3_zone_minerals_wilderness
                    set_planet_flag = bca_pf_ps_selected_zone_z4_zone_minerals_wilderness
                    set_planet_flag = bca_pf_ps_selected_zone_z5_zone_minerals_wilderness
        }
    }
    if = {
        limit = {
            has_planet_flag = bca_pf_ps_zone_option_elected_s15_wilderness_energy
        }
        set_planet_flag = bca_pf_ps_selected_zone_type_zx_wilderness_energy
                set_planet_flag = bca_pf_ps_selected_zone_type_z3_wilderness_energy
                set_planet_flag = bca_pf_ps_selected_zone_type_z4_wilderness_energy
                set_planet_flag = bca_pf_ps_selected_zone_type_z5_wilderness_energy
        if = {
            limit = {
                has_planet_flag = bca_pf_ps_option_map_wilderness_energy_zone_energy_wilderness
            }
            set_planet_flag = bca_pf_ps_selected_zone_zx_zone_energy_wilderness
                    set_planet_flag = bca_pf_ps_selected_zone_z3_zone_energy_wilderness
                    set_planet_flag = bca_pf_ps_selected_zone_z4_zone_energy_wilderness
                    set_planet_flag = bca_pf_ps_selected_zone_z5_zone_energy_wilderness
        }
    }
    if = {
        limit = {
            has_planet_flag = bca_pf_ps_zone_option_elected_s15_wilderness_food
        }
        set_planet_flag = bca_pf_ps_selected_zone_type_zx_wilderness_food
                set_planet_flag = bca_pf_ps_selected_zone_type_z3_wilderness_food
                set_planet_flag = bca_pf_ps_selected_zone_type_z4_wilderness_food
                set_planet_flag = bca_pf_ps_selected_zone_type_z5_wilderness_food
        if = {
            limit = {
                has_planet_flag = bca_pf_ps_option_map_wilderness_food_zone_food_wilderness
            }
            set_planet_flag = bca_pf_ps_selected_zone_zx_zone_food_wilderness
                    set_planet_flag = bca_pf_ps_selected_zone_z3_zone_food_wilderness
                    set_planet_flag = bca_pf_ps_selected_zone_z4_zone_food_wilderness
                    set_planet_flag = bca_pf_ps_selected_zone_z5_zone_food_wilderness
        }
    }

        remove_planet_flag = bca_pf_ps_ext_zone_zx

    bca_clean_flags_zone_selector_secondary_district = yes
